mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-invnmove-sql-oracle.xml - selectInvnAdMoveList */

/* wms-inventory-invnmove-sql-oracle.xml - selectTworkInfoIvatLcMap */ SELECT IVLC.CTKEY /* 센터 코드 */ , IVLC.OWKEY /* 화주 코드 */ , ZN.ZNKEY /* 존 코드 */ , AR.ARKEY /* 구역코드 */ , LC.LCKEY /* 로케이션 코드 */ , LC.LCSTORGTYPECD /* 로케이션 보관유형 */ , TOZN.ZNKEY AS TOZNKEY /* 도착 존 코드 */ , TOAR.ARKEY AS TOARKEY /* 도착 구역코드 */ , TOLC.LCKEY AS TOLCKEY /* 도착 로케이션 코드 */ , COALESCE(TOLC.IVCNTRMGMTYN, 'N') AS IVCNTRMGMTYN /* 재고용기관리여부 */ , IVLC.IVSERIALNO /* 재고시리얼번호 */ , IVLC.IVSERIALDIVCD /* 재고시리얼구분코드 */ , IVLC.ICKEY /* 상품코드 */ , IC.ICUNITKEY /* 상품 단위 코드 */ , IVLC.IVATKEY /* 재고 속성 코드 */ , IV.TCDCDIVCD /* TCDC구분코드 */ , IV.PRDCTDATE /* 생산일시 */ , IV.EXPDATE /* 유통기한 */ , IV.ICTMPRDIVCD /* 상품온도구분코드 */ , IVLC.TOTQTY /* 총 수량 */ , IVLC.AVQTY /* 가용 수량 */ , IVLC.ALQTY /* 할당 수량 */ , IVLC.HOLDQTY /* 보류 수량 */ , ICTP.ICUNITTYPECD /* 상품 단위 유형 */ , ICTP.ICUNITQTY /* 단위 수량 */ , ICTP.WEIGHT /* 무게 */ , IVLC.IBHDKEY /* 입고주문번호 */ , IVLC.IBDTKEY /* 입고주문상세번호 */ , IVLC.IBCFSEQNO /* 입고확정일련번호 */ , IVLC.IVINVSTGTYN /* 재고조사대상여부 */ , IVLC.HOLDRSNCD /* 보류사유코드 */ , IVLC.HOLDDTCONT /* 보류상세내용 */ , IVLC.IVSTATUSCD /* 재고상태코드 */ , IVLC.INSERTDATE /* 입력 일시 */ , IVLC.INSERTURKEY /* 입력 사용자 ID */ , IVLC.UPDATEDATE /* 수정 일시 */ , IVLC.UPDATEURKEY /* 수정 사용자 ID */ FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLC IVLC INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT IV ON IV.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IV.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IV.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY AND IV.IVATKEY = IVLC.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON LC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND LC.LCKEY = IVLC.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_AR AR ON AR.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND AR.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY AND AR.ARKEY = LC.ARKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN ZN ON ZN.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND ZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LC TOLC ON TOLC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND TOLC.LCKEY = #{tolckey} LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_AR TOAR ON TOAR.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND TOAR.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY AND TOAR.ARKEY = LC.ARKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ZN TOZN ON TOZN.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND TOZN.ZNKEY = LC.ZNKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_CT CT ON CT.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW OW ON OW.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC IC ON IC.CTKEY = IVLC.CTKEY AND IC.OWKEY = IVLC.OWKEY AND IC.ICKEY = IVLC.ICKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE ICTP ON ICTP.CTKEY = IC.CTKEY AND ICTP.OWKEY = IC.OWKEY AND ICTP.ICKEY = IC.ICKEY AND ICTP.ICUNITTYPECD = COALESCE(#{uom}, 'EA')
AND IVLC.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVLC.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVLC.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVLC.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey} AND IVLC.IVSERIALNO = #{ivserialno}
mapper.sql:
SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LCKEY ,A.ULCKEY ,A.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,A.ICKEY ,A.TTQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS TTQTY ,A.AVQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS AVQTY ,A.ALQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS ALQTY ,A.PIQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS PIQTY ,A.PAQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS PAQTY ,A.HOQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS HOQTY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,B.PRODUCTDATE ,B.EXPIREDATE ,B.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.IVATSTATUS ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'IVATSTATUS' || ';' || A.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_DESC ,C.ERPSTLC ,H.LCKEY AS TO_LCKEY ,(SELECT LCTYPE FROM TWORK_MST_LC LC WHERE LC.LCKEY = H.LCKEY AND LC.CTKEY = H.CTKEY ) AS TO_LCTYPE ,'' AS TO_ERPSTLC ,'' AS TO_ULCKEY ,((A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY) / G.ICUTQTY) AS MV_QTY ,D.USE_ERPSTLC ,E.UOM ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' || ';' || E.UOM AS UOM_DESC ,E.ICUTKEY ,G.ICUTQTY ,E.ICNAME ,E.SPEC FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON B.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = E.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT F ON E.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = F.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON E.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = G.ICUTKEY AND E.UOM = G.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY WHERE A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY > 0 AND (A.LCKEY IN ('PICKTO_A','PICKTO_B','PICKTO_C') ) AND ( (A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY ) / G.ICUTQTY ) > 0 AND F.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey}
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}

SELECT A.CTKEY ,A.IVATKEY ,A.LCKEY ,A.ULCKEY ,A.OWKEY ,(SELECT OWNAME FROM TWORK_MST_OW OW WHERE OW.OWKEY = A.OWKEY) AS OWNAME ,A.ICKEY ,A.TTQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS TTQTY ,A.AVQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS AVQTY ,A.ALQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS ALQTY ,A.PIQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS PIQTY ,A.PAQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS PAQTY ,A.HOQTY / G.ICUTQTY AS HOQTY ,((A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY) / G.ICUTQTY) AS MV_QTY ,A.INSERTDATE ,A.INSERTURKEY ,A.UPDATEDATE ,A.UPDATEURKEY ,B.PRODUCTDATE ,B.EXPIREDATE ,B.IBCONFIRMDATE ,B.IVATSTATUS ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'IVATSTATUS' || ';' || A.IVATSTATUS AS IVATSTATUS_DESC ,C.ERPSTLC ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ERPSTLC' ||';'|| C.ERPSTLC AS ERPSTLC_DESC ,H.LCKEY AS TO_LCKEY ,'' AS TO_ERPSTLC ,'' AS TO_ULCKEY ,D.USE_ERPSTLC ,E.UOM ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'ICUTTYPE' || ';' || E.UOM AS UOM_DESC ,E.ICUTKEY ,G.ICUTQTY ,E.ICNAME ,E.SPEC ,E.ACKEY ,I.ACNAME ,J.URKEY ,J.URKEY AS URKEY_DESC ,C.LCTYPE ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'LCTYPE' ||';'|| C.LCTYPE AS LCTYPE_DESC ,E.LOGGRPCD ,A.CTKEY || ';' || 'LOGGRPCD' || ';' || E.LOGGRPCD AS LOGGRPCD_DESC FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC A INNER JOIN TWORK_INFO_IVAT B ON A.CTKEY = B.CTKEY AND A.IVATKEY = B.IVATKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC C ON A.CTKEY = C.CTKEY AND A.LCKEY = C.LCKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_OW D ON A.OWKEY = D.OWKEY INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_IC E ON B.CTKEY = E.CTKEY AND B.ICKEY = E.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUT F ON E.OWKEY = F.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = F.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = F.ICUTKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ICUTXTYPE G ON E.OWKEY = G.OWKEY AND E.CTKEY = G.CTKEY AND E.ICUTKEY = G.ICUTKEY AND E.UOM = G.ICUTTYPE LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_LCXIC H ON A.CTKEY = H.CTKEY AND A.OWKEY = H.OWKEY AND A.ICKEY = H.ICKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_AC I ON E.CTKEY = I.CTKEY AND E.ACKEY = I.ACKEY AND E.OWKEY = I.OWKEY LEFT JOIN TWORK_MST_ACXUR J ON E.CTKEY = J.CTKEY AND E.ACKEY = J.ACKEY AND E.LOGGRPCD = J.LOGGRPCD AND E.OWKEY = J.OWKEY WHERE F.CLOSDATE >= #{sysdate} AND A.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND A.AVQTY + A.HOQTY > 0
AND #{SEARCH_CONDITION}
mapper.select: /* wms-inventory-invnmove-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatByLcByUlcByPk - 재고 정보 조회 */ SELECT IVAT.CTKEY , IVAT.IVATKEY , IVAT.LCKEY , IVAT.ULCKEY , IVAT.OWKEY , IVAT.ICKEY , IVAT.TTQTY , IVAT.AVQTY , IVAT.ALQTY , IVAT.PIQTY , IVAT.PAQTY , IVAT.HOQTY , IVAT.LOQTY , IVAT.IVATSTATUS , IVAT.LOGGRPCD , LC.LCTYPE , LC.LCSTORTYPE FROM TWORK_INFO_IVATXLCXULC IVAT INNER JOIN TWORK_MST_LC LC ON IVAT.CTKEY = LC.CTKEY AND IVAT.LCKEY = LC.LCKEY WHERE IVAT.CTKEY = #{ctkey} AND IVAT.IVATKEY = #{ivatkey} AND IVAT.LCKEY = #{lckey} AND IVAT.ULCKEY = #{ulckey} AND IVAT.OWKEY = #{owkey} AND IVAT.ICKEY = #{ickey}
/* wms-inbound-invnmanager-sql-oracle.xml - selectIvatkeycount - ivatkey 생성 */ SELECT FN_GET_KEYCOUNT_IVAT(#{ctkey} , #{surkey}) AS IVATKEY

SELECT SUM(TTQTY) AS SUM_TTQTY , SUM(AVQTY) AS SUM_AVQTY , SUM(ALQTY) AS SUM_ALQTY , SUM(PIQTY) AS SUM_PIQTY , SUM(PAQTY) AS SUM_PAQTY , SUM(HOQTY) AS SUM_HOQTY , SUM(ORAVQTY) AS SUM_ORAVQTY FROM (
)

SELECT SUM(TTQTY) AS SUM_TTQTY , SUM(AVQTY) AS SUM_AVQTY , SUM(ALQTY) AS SUM_ALQTY , SUM(PIQTY) AS SUM_PIQTY , SUM(PAQTY) AS SUM_PAQTY , SUM(HOQTY) AS SUM_HOQTY , SUM(ORAVQTY) AS SUM_ORAVQTY FROM (
)

SELECT SUM(TTQTY) AS SUM_TTQTY , SUM(AVQTY) AS SUM_AVQTY , SUM(ALQTY) AS SUM_ALQTY , SUM(PIQTY) AS SUM_PIQTY , SUM(PAQTY) AS SUM_PAQTY , SUM(HOQTY) AS SUM_HOQTY , SUM(ORAVQTY) AS SUM_ORAVQTY FROM (
)

SELECT SUM(TTQTY) AS SUM_TTQTY , SUM(AVQTY) AS SUM_AVQTY , SUM(ALQTY) AS SUM_ALQTY , SUM(PIQTY) AS SUM_PIQTY , SUM(PAQTY) AS SUM_PAQTY , SUM(HOQTY) AS SUM_HOQTY , SUM(ORAVQTY) AS SUM_ORAVQTY FROM (
)
